commands.review_summary:
The PR updates memory-core manager and CLI vector-degradation warnings to distinguish sqlite-vec load failures from missing embedding/provider readiness, and adds focused regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible with high confidence: current main mislabels no-loadError degraded writes as sqlite-vec failures, and the CLI warning check can skip store-ready but semantic-unavailable index results. I did not execute the repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed because the proposed patch is focused, proof is supplied, and no blocking findings were found.
